details.generated_code:
def find_zero(xs: list):
    # Evaluate polynomial at min and max coefficient values
    min_val = min(xs)
    max_val = max(xs)
    
    # Use bisection method between min_val and max_val
    left, right = min_val, max_val
    
    while right - left > 1e-9:
        mid = (left + right) / 2
        val = poly(xs, mid)
        
        if val == 0:
            return mid
        
        # Check signs at endpoints
        left_val = poly(xs, left)
        right_val = poly(xs, right)
